issues.description: FlipLife and KO are sequenced without conditional logic. The card text states 'You may turn 1 card...': this is optional, and the KO should only be possible if the flip action succeeds. Current DSL executes both unconditionally. Should use a condition or restructure to reflect the optional 'may' and the dependency.
Target uses 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but card text says 'up to 1', meaning zero targets is also valid. Scope should support optional targeting or target.count should be {min:0, max:1}.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-up: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 3 or less.
